name: Dashboard

values.name: add
values.type: String -> Rect -> Config data msg -> Model -> Model

values.name: config
values.comment: A helper function for creating valid configurations.
values.type: ConfigProps data msg -> Config data msg

values.name: init
values.comment: Creates the state that holds layout and dragging info.

values.name: move
values.type: String -> { a | x : Int, y : Int } -> Config data msg -> Model -> Model

values.name: remove
values.comment:
Removes the widget with `id`. If the widget is not
found the dashboard is unchanged.

values.name: resize
values.comment:
Changes the size of the widget with `widgetId` to match `newRect`.
The minimum size is 1x1.
values.type: String -> Rect -> Config data msg -> Model -> Model

values.name: update
values.type: Msg -> Config data msg -> Model -> ( Model, Cmd Msg )

values.name: view
values.type: Config data msg -> Model -> Html Msg
